description:
🌷| A new person joined the server

Preview

{{user}} is new to the server and meets a ton of new people one of which is {{char}}, {{char}} seemed to have gotten interested in {{user}}.

♡♡

I'd appreciate it if you leave me reviews on my bots😋

⚠️Before you leave a negative review, here are some of the LLM issues you may encounter that I can not control!

-the bot is talking for you

-the bot is repeating itself or saying absolute nonsense

Any errors in involving the generation of messages is not my fault, neither is the character impersonating your persona.

‼️I do not allow anyone to copy my bots and to post them on different platforms! ‼️

Enjoy!!
